name: Ham and Cheese with Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave margarine uncovered in a custard cup on high until softened, 15 to 30 seconds.
2. Blend in mustard.
3. Spread margarine on one side of each toasted slice.
4. Place the slices with buttered sides up on a serving plate; top with ham, tomato, and cheese slices.
5. Microwave uncovered until the cheese begins to melt, 1 1/2 to 2 minutes.
6. Top each sandwich with a spoonful of coleslaw.
